parameters.query:
WITH
recent_errors AS (
  SELECT e."workflowId", COALESCE(w.name, e."workflowId") AS workflow_name, e."startedAt"
  FROM execution_entity e
  LEFT JOIN workflow_entity w ON w.id::text = e."workflowId"
  WHERE e.status = 'error'
    AND e."startedAt" > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
  ORDER BY e."startedAt" DESC
  LIMIT 10
),
auth_errors AS (
  SELECT e."workflowId", COALESCE(w.name, e."workflowId") AS workflow_name, e."startedAt"
  FROM execution_entity e
  LEFT JOIN workflow_entity w ON w.id::text = e."workflowId"
  WHERE e.status = 'error'
    AND e."startedAt" > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
    AND (
      e.data::text ILIKE '%EAUTH%'
      OR e.data::text ILIKE '%401%'
      OR e.data::text ILIKE '%refresh token%'
      OR e.data::text ILIKE '%invalid_grant%'
      OR e.data::text ILIKE '%token has been expired or revoked%'
    )
  ORDER BY e."startedAt" DESC
  LIMIT 10
),
error_rate_spikes AS (
  SELECT e."workflowId", COALESCE(w.name, e."workflowId") AS workflow_name, COUNT(*) AS error_count
  FROM execution_entity e
  LEFT JOIN workflow_entity w ON w.id::text = e."workflowId"
  WHERE e.status = 'error'
    AND e."startedAt" > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
  GROUP BY e."workflowId", w.name
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 5
),
critical_last_runs AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (e."workflowId")
    e."workflowId" AS workflow_id,
    COALESCE(w.name, e."workflowId") AS workflow_name,
    e.status,
    e."stoppedAt" AS last_run_at
  FROM execution_entity e
  LEFT JOIN workflow_entity w ON w.id::text = e."workflowId"
  WHERE e."workflowId" IN (
    'axeg30n8SVKlCW54',
    'pdIjiyIfVIIPuJIt',
    '0jSwjm74Bna7FSqr',
    'gyM9rnvUMfnv4x3G'
  )
  AND e."stoppedAt" IS NOT NULL
  ORDER BY e."workflowId", e."stoppedAt" DESC
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('workflowId', "workflowId", 'workflowName', workflow_name, 'errorAt', "startedAt")) FROM recent_errors),
    '[]'
  ) AS recent_errors,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('workflowId', "workflowId", 'workflowName', workflow_name, 'errorAt', "startedAt")) FROM auth_errors),
    '[]'
  ) AS auth_errors,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('workflowId', "workflowId", 'workflowName', workflow_name, 'errorCount', error_count, 'windowMinutes', 30)) FROM error_rate_spikes),
    '[]'
  ) AS error_rate_spikes,
  (SELECT "startedAt" FROM execution_entity WHERE "workflowId" = '3ceKeNWmdj455Tcr' AND status = 'success' ORDER BY "startedAt" DESC LIMIT 1) AS wf5_last_success,
  (SELECT "startedAt" FROM execution_entity WHERE "workflowId" = 'gyM9rnvUMfnv4x3G' AND status = 'success' ORDER BY "startedAt" DESC LIMIT 1) AS wf8_last_success,
  (SELECT "startedAt" FROM execution_entity WHERE "workflowId" = 'wbOhFKXQqBpJWB1w' AND status = 'success' ORDER BY "startedAt" DESC LIMIT 1) AS wf3_last_success,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('workflowId', workflow_id, 'workflowName', workflow_name, 'lastStatus', status, 'lastRunAt', last_run_at)) FROM critical_last_runs),
    '[]'
  ) AS critical_workflow_last_runs
SELECT MAX(created_at) AS last_backup_ok_at FROM automatenlager.warnings WHERE warning_type = 'BACKUP_OK'
SELECT warning_key FROM automatenlager.warnings WHERE source_workflow = 'wf-monitor' AND created_at >= (CURRENT_DATE AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Berlin')
